steps.title: Write the graphed line equation
steps.content:
From the graph, line $g$ passes through $(-10,12)$ and $(0,1)$. Its slope is
$$\frac{1-12}{0-(-10)}=-\frac{11}{10}$$
So an equation for line $g$ is
$$y=-\frac{11}{10}x+1$$

steps.title: Match the identical line
steps.content:
For infinitely many solutions, line $k$ must be the same line. Since $165x+py=w$ has $165=15\cdot11$, multiply the whole equation for line $g$ by $15$:
$$165x+150y=150$$
